message:
feat(db): add cache benchmarks, golden tests, coalesce stress tests, and evidence wiring

Database crate testing and performance infrastructure:

Benchmarks:
- cache_bench.rs: add micro-benchmarks for cache hit/miss paths,
  eviction policies, and concurrent access patterns to establish
  performance baselines for the query result cache

Source changes:
- cache.rs: cache implementation refinements to support benchmark
  instrumentation and golden test determinism
- coalesce.rs: message coalescing improvements for thread aggregation
  correctness under concurrent writes
- queries.rs: query layer adjustments for evidence wiring support
- search_service.rs: search service updates for new cache integration

Tests:
- cache_golden.rs: deterministic golden tests that snapshot cache
  behavior for specific input sequences, detecting unintended
  behavioral changes in cache eviction and lookup order
- coalesce_stress.rs: stress tests exercising message coalescing under
  high concurrency with randomized message ordering to detect race
  conditions and data loss
- evidence_wiring.rs: tests validating the evidence ledger wiring —
  ensuring that all database mutations emit structured evidence records
  for audit trail completeness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
